title: Project Lightwell brings open source security into the AI era
summary: Project Lightwell is IBM and Red Hat's $5 billion investment to secure the open source ecosystem using AI-augmented engineers and a trusted security clearinghouse. It addresses cyberattacks that increasingly exploit open source software, which powers over 90% of Fortune 500 companies.
